title: Model-aware lead profiles
description: config/lead-profiles.json — the ordered list of lead-doctrine profiles applied per active model by extensions/lead-config.ts. First profile whose `match` (regex, or literal substring if the regex fails to compile) tests true against the active model id wins; non-`fallback` profiles are tried first, then the `fallback` profile as the catch-all. The matched profile's `doctrine` is appended to the system prompt every prompt. Malleable: extra fields allowed so the extension can grow a profile without breaking validation.

name.description: Profile id shown in the injected header.

match.description: Regex tested against the active model id (falls back to substring .includes if it will not compile). Ignored for the fallback profile.

doctrine.description: Lead-doctrine text injected into the system prompt for this profile. Should state that it complements AGENTS.md and which sections it overrides.

writePolicy.description: Informational note on whether this lead's edits are gated by extensions/read-only-default.ts. Not enforced here.

fallback.description: True marks the catch-all profile applied when no non-fallback profile matches a usable model id.
